title: adenostemma harlingii
intro: Adenostemma harlingii, also known as the blue porterweed, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia, particularly found in Sri Lanka and India. The plant is used in traditional medicine, valued for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Adenostemma harlingii include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and other nervous disorders due to its sedative effects. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, and can also be dried and used in herbal supplements.
